description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a symmetrical facade, set within a fenced yard. The exterior walls are painted a muted gray-blue, complemented by white window frames and trim. The property features a paved driveway leading to a garage, a front porch with steps, and a landscaped garden with several trees and shrubs. The backyard includes a patio area and additional greenery, enclosed by a white fence. Windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on both floors, providing a balanced appearance. The house sits adjacent to a main road, with a secondary driveway and sidewalk access.
description: A two-story gray-blue suburban house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch, garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side wall, secondary driveway, and backyard with patio and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and symmetrical window arrangement on the back facade.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garage entrance, side yard, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, and white trim, flanked by windows and landscaping.
